name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that keeps your slides looking human, not algorithmic.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools churn out cookie-cutter slides that look templated and unconvincing, undermining credibility with professional audiences. Chronicle 2.0 gives teams AI assistance for speed without sacrificing the design quality and originality that makes presentations land. It solves the gap between polished professional decks and the low-effort output typical AI tools produce.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that look custom-designed rather than AI-generated
Creating client-facing proposals and reports with consistent, professional visual quality
Producing internal strategy or roadmap presentations quickly without a design team
Developing sales enablement materials that stand out from competitor slide templates
